MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2004 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT SHELL OF ALAMEDA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/10/05 IS CONTINUED TO 2/7/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. COUNSEL WAIVE FURTHER NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL. THE CURRENT MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED. DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: JENNIFER J. CAPABIANCO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, SHELL OF ALAMEDA. TIMOTHY G. TIETJEN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY. LANDA SIU MORRIS, ESQ.
